db_cluster_identifier.description: The identifier of the DB cluster to retrieve the snapshot for.

db_cluster_snapshot_identifier.description: The identifier of the specific DB cluster snapshot to retrieve.

include_public.description: Whether to include public snapshots in the result.

include_shared.description: Whether to include shared snapshots in the result.

most_recent.description: If true, selects the most recent snapshot.

snapshot_type.description: The type of snapshots to be included (e.g., 'automated', 'manual').
